Acme Help Center

Answers to the questions we hear most often.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the Acme toolkit?

Acme is a developer toolkit that turns ideas into shipping products with zero boilerplate.

Do I need a credit card to start?

No. You can create a free account and explore every core feature without entering payment details.

Can I cancel at any time?

Yes. Plans are month to month and you can downgrade or cancel from your dashboard whenever you like.

Is support included?

Every plan includes email support, and paid tiers add priority chat with our engineering team.
